event_flows.idempotency_basis: command_id, idempotency_key, durable receipt, stale-view guards
event_flows.ordering_scope: manifest_id or item_id plus shell/frame generation
event_flows.rebuild_source: receipts, outbox rows, and current control truth
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Receipts remain durable recovery anchors; queue transport is disposable.
event_flows.transport_channel: transactional outbox -> queue/broker -> projector and workers
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Supports durable rebase, duplicate-safe retries, and fresh snapshots after lost POST responses.

event_flows.idempotency_basis: upload_session_id plus frozen request/item visibility binding
event_flows.ordering_scope: tenant_id, client_id, request_version_ref or item_id, upload_session_id
event_flows.producer: upload session service and publish command handlers
event_flows.rebuild_source: upload session metadata plus immutable blob refs and scan outcomes
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Rejected, quarantined, and superseded uploads remain explicit history rather than disappearing.
event_flows.transport_channel: upload staging API -> scan workers -> publish command -> projection refresh
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Clients can resume, retry, or replace in the same governed request lane without rebinding older bytes silently.

event_flows.rebuild_source: AuthorityInteractionRecord plus sealed AuthorityRequestEnvelope, not broker replay
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Request identity and exact sealed envelopes remain durable for audit, resend legality, and reconciliation.
event_flows.transport_channel: durable outbox -> queue/broker -> authority gateway -> provider API
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Prevents duplicate legal mutations and keeps pending or unknown authority posture explainable after retries or recovery.

event_flows.producer: callback handlers, poll workers, and recovery readers
event_flows.rebuild_source: persisted ingress receipts, response envelopes, interaction records, and submission records
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Async provider payloads remain durable ingress evidence before any legal-state mutation.
event_flows.transport_channel: provider callback or poll -> ingress checkpoint -> normalized response -> control-store mutation
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Quarantines ambiguous or duplicate provider deliveries instead of mutating UI state from transport memory alone.

event_flows.rebuild_source: SubmissionRecord, AuthorityInteractionRecord, AuthorityIngressReceipt, and inbox truth
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Outstanding authority work resumes from durable control packets, not worker memory or recent broker logs.
event_flows.transport_channel: scheduled queue work and manual investigation surfaces
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Recovered environments reopen only after authority rebuild and binding revalidation are proven.

event_flows.idempotency_basis: experience_sequence or workspace_sequence plus resume-token binding
event_flows.ordering_scope: manifest_id or item_id plus frame_epoch and sequence frontier
event_flows.rebuild_source: primary control truth, append-only evidence, and latest immutable refs
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Live deltas are disposable; snapshots and cursors can be regenerated or invalidated safely.
event_flows.transport_channel: projector -> projection store -> SSE or notification fanout
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Preserves ordered live updates while letting clients rebase to fresh snapshots after compaction or visibility drift.

event_flows.idempotency_basis: event family identity, payload hash, originating activity ref
event_flows.ordering_scope: manifest_id plus event chronology and graph partition contract
event_flows.rebuild_source: append-only evidence itself plus immutable blob refs when bodies are externalized
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Audit and provenance survive payload limitation through explicit tombstones or lineage minimums.
event_flows.transport_channel: append-only evidence write plus query indexes or projections
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Enquiry, audit, and replay views can explain legal decisions from one traversable evidence graph.

event_flows.rebuild_source: RetentionTag, ArtifactRetention, ErasureProof, limitation notes, and surviving blob refs
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Expired or erased evidence remains explicit as typed limitation posture instead of disappearing from proof and audit render paths.
event_flows.transport_channel: policy evaluation jobs -> control updates -> append-only proofs -> projection degradation
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Surviving proof, audit, and customer-safe projections degrade deterministically under retention pressure.

event_flows.producer: restore controller, replay orchestrator, and recovery operators
event_flows.rebuild_source: control store, append-only audit store, immutable object store, and durable outbox/inbox truth
event_flows.retention_replay_posture: Exact replay fails closed if basis is unreadable; restore fails closed until audit continuity, privacy reconciliation, queue rebuild, and authority revalidation pass.
event_flows.transport_channel: restore drill -> rebuild jobs -> projection/cursor refresh -> reopen gate
event_flows.user_visible_surface_impact: Reopened environments remain blocked until every typed restore gate is satisfied; clients rebase from reconstructed snapshots rather than stale caches.
